task_completion.description: Navigate to Squoosh.app in a web browser
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open with the URL bar showing 'squoosh.app' and the Squoosh interface loaded.

task_completion.description: Load the source marketing image into Squoosh
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Squoosh.app interface shows an image loaded, with indicators or file dialogs confirming the source file 'marketing_hero_source.png' was selected.

task_completion.description: Enable resizing and set the width to 1280 pixels
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Squoosh.app edit panel, the 'Resize' toggle is enabled and the 'Width' input field is set to exactly 1280.

task_completion.description: Select WebP as the output compression format
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Squoosh.app edit panel, the compression format dropdown menu is set to 'WebP'.

task_completion.description: Set the WebP compression quality to 85
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Squoosh.app edit panel under the WebP settings, the 'Quality' slider or numeric input is set to 85.

task_completion.description: Save the optimized image to the correct output directory with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window, terminal `ls` output, or browser download dialog showing 'hero_optimized.webp' successfully saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/WebReady' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Squoosh.app web interface to optimize the image
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent actively configuring settings (Resize, WebP, Quality) within the Squoosh.app browser interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal CLI tools to bypass the web app requirement
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show the use of command-line image processing tools like 'convert', 'mogrify', or 'cwebp' to perform the resizing and conversion.

integrity.description: The final file was downloaded from the Squoosh application
integrity.visual_evidence: A browser download popup, save-as dialog, or download history showing the file originating from the browser, rather than being manually created or copied.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source image is a 3840x2160 PNG located at /home/ga/Pictures/RawAssets/marketing_hero_source.png. The agent must use the web application at https://squoosh.app to process it. The target specifications are: exactly 1280 pixels width (±2 pixel tolerance), WebP format, and 85 quality. The final output must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/WebReady/hero_optimized.webp.
